'''Denn Walc''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] from [[Cona/Legends|Cona]]. He was the son of [[Grand Nest]] [[Nest Leader|Leader]], [[Kimar Walc]]. When it was time for him to select a mate, he interviewed fellow [[Gender/Legends|female]] Arconans. When he finally selected a mate, he went up to her nest with a crowd. When she came out to greet him however, everyone gasped in horror. She had become a [[Salt/Legends|salt]] addict in the short time since he first saw her. She was unable to produce offspring.

{{Char-stub}}
